name: Inpulse Inc Which Will Do Bus
notes: FMCSA SAFER keyword and name searches for 'INPULSE' returned no carrier records. The 'Which Will Do Bus' suffix in the input name is typical California corporate naming when registering an alternate name/DBA for bus operations; no SAFER record was located. An unrelated 'Inpulse, inc.' (RFID/access-control consultancy) exists in San Francisco at a different address (451 South Van Ness Ave), so the 70 Parkridge Dr entity is likely a small intrastate operator below FMCSA interstate registration thresholds or registered only at the state/county level (likely SF County Clerk FBN). California SOS Bizfile search recommended for confirmation.

name: School Run Bus Svc
notes: FMCSA SAFER keyword and name searches for 'SCHOOL RUN BUS' and 'SCHOOL RUN' returned no carrier records. The address (11685 Alief Clodine Rd #54, Houston, TX 77082) is a suite address consistent with a very small/single-vehicle intrastate operator. Likely operates wholly intrastate within Texas (under TxDMV authority) and below FMCSA interstate USDOT registration thresholds, OR registered under a different legal/DBA name. Texas SOS SOSDirect (fee-based) needed for definitive corporate registry confirmation; Texas Comptroller taxable entity search is a free alternative.

name: Synergy Auto Bus
notes: FMCSA SAFER searches for 'SYNERGY AUTO BUS' returned no exact match. Several similarly-named Houston carriers exist but at different addresses and with different scopes: SYNERGY AUTO TRANSPORT LLC (USDOT 2249505) is auto hauling not bus; SYNERGY TRANSPORT SERVICES LLC (USDOT 3891557) is a 1-truck trucking carrier; SYNERGY GLOBAL TRANSPORTATION INC is in Houston 77069 - none match 14403 Ella Blvd, Houston 77014. Address at 14403 Ella Blvd #1306 is a suite/PO-box-style address suggesting a very small intrastate operator. Likely wholly intrastate Texas bus operation below FMCSA interstate threshold, or no FMCSA registration.

name: Sab School Transportation
notes: FMCSA SAFER searches for 'SAB SCHOOL', 'SAB TRANSPORTATION', and 'SAB SCHOOL TRANSPORTATION' returned no carrier records. Keyword 'SAB' returned only entities in Vienna VA and Oconomowoc WI, neither in NJ. Address at 371 Hoes Ln #200, Piscataway, NJ 08854 is a small suite address near Rutgers/ESCNJ Transportation HQ; entity is likely a very small intrastate NJ school bus contractor (NJ school buses operate under NJ MVC Type S endorsement and may not require FMCSA interstate USDOT). Not found on NJSBCA member directory or in NJ DOE 2020-21 / 2022-23 contractor code lists in returned results. NJ Business Name Search needed at NJ Treasury Division of Revenue for entity status confirmation.

name: Yakelin Marrero Sch Trnsprtn
notes: FMCSA SAFER searches for 'YAKELIN MARRERO' and 'YAKELIN' returned no carrier records. Keyword search for 'MARRERO' returned 240+ unrelated MARRERO-named carriers, none matching this entity or Colorado Springs/2007 Kodiak Dr address. An earlier web result conflated this entity with Kodiak Transportation LLC (USDOT 2864147, Englewood CO) but that is a property broker, not a school bus carrier - confirmed wrong match. Manta business directory has a listing for 'Yakelin Marrero School Transportation Inc' (Manta page returned HTTP 403). Entity is likely a very small intrastate Colorado school bus operator below FMCSA interstate USDOT threshold, with operations registered under Colorado intrastate authority only. Colorado SOS Business Entity Search needed for incorporation date and entity status.
